chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. C.P D-1170 of 2012: Adnan Arshad vs. Federation of Pakistan and others. For the Petitioner: None Present. For the Respondents: Mr. Asif Hussain Chandio, Advocate For Federation of Pakistan: Mr. Oshaq Ali Sangi, Assistant Attorney General. Date of hearing: 08.05.2024 Date of Order: 08.05.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. This petition pertains to service matters in PEPCO, admittedly a body corporate devoid of statutory rules. The petition is prima facie not maintainable on such ground alone. Even otherwise the Petitioner seeks employment on the basis of some competitive process having been conducted in 2010; however, present petition was filed in 2012, therefore, barred by laches. Admittedly, the petitioner was not declared as successful in the competitive recruitment process and no case is made out to inquire into such proceedings, as sought in the petition, inter alia as the writ jurisdiction is not amenable for determination of disputed factual controversies requiring inquiry and / or evidence. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
